## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make teach-validate`
- [ ] Component-specific validation:

## Security Review

- [ ] No real OCIDs, IP addresses, credentials, API key fingerprints, Terraform state, or raw authenticated screenshots are included.
- [ ] New inputs are parameterized through variables, environment, or OCI Vault.
- [ ] Teardown behavior is unchanged or documented.

## Documentation

- [ ] README, runbook, KB, dashboard, or teaching docs updated when user-facing behavior changed.
